quotes.verbatim_quote:
practice playing groupings of three consecutive eighth notes starting on
different places within the bar.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Core method instruction for three-note grouping displacement.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
The following exercises, 10-13, are written out in varying time signatures but should be played
superimposed over
quotes.why_load_bearing: Defines superimposing odd meters over 4/4 pulse.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
Each one consists of two
groupings of eighth-note triplets, but only four of the six notes are sounded.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Rule of selectively silencing two of six triplet subdivisions.
